rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Login/register route handlers do NOT use withAuth — they are the auth entrypoints and must accept unauthenticated requests","scope":"src/app/api/auth"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Route handlers should delegate to existing service-layer functions rather than duplicating auth logic","scope":"src/app/api/auth"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Use getPayloadInstance() from @/services/progress for Payload CMS initialization in route handlers","scope":"src/app/api"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Follow the established singleton pattern from src/auth/withAuth.ts for consistent Payload access across the codebase","scope":"src/auth"}]}
